title: Trigger data model, Clock interface, and engine lifecycle
description:
Implement the core repeating trigger functionality from docs/plan-repeating-triggers.md.

Sections: Data Model, evalAndFire Changes, processEvent Expiry Reaping, List() Returns Value Copies

Key deliverables:
- Add MaxFirings, ExpiresAt, Cooldown, FireCount, LastFiredAt fields to Trigger struct (automation.go)
- Clock interface + realClock default implementation (trigger.go)
- effectiveMaxFirings() method
- resolveExpiresAt(raw string, now time.Time) utility (automation.go)
- Rewrite evalAndFire with lock-safe cooldown/expiry checks and fire-count tracking (trigger.go)
- Update processEvent with expiry reaping (trigger.go)
- List() returns value copies instead of live pointers (trigger.go)
- NewTriggerEngine constructor accepting optional Clock
- Unit tests: RepeatingFiresMultipleTimes, UnlimitedFirings, DefaultOneShotPreserved, CooldownSkipsRapidEvents, CooldownAllowsAfterDuration, ExpiresAtRemovesTrigger, ExpiresAtAllowsBeforeDeadline, ExpiryReapingOnUnrelatedEvent, CooldownAndMaxFirings, CooldownAndCondition, FireCountTracking, LastFiredAtTracking, ConcurrentAddDuringProcessEvent

References:
- Plan: docs/plan-repeating-triggers.md §Data Model, §Implementation Details
- Test harness: docs/plan-repeating-triggers-test-harness.md §Property-Based Tests
